content.text:
All 6 files created and 33 tests pass.

**Files created:**
- `src/components/primitives/Button.tsx` — variant/size/tone props, loading state shows `"..."`
- `src/components/primitives/Link.tsx` — wraps `next/link`; external mode adds `target=_blank`, `rel="noopener noreferrer"`, and `↗` glyph
- `src/components/primitives/Surface.tsx` — `<section>` with tone/padding/border tokens
- `src/components/primitives/Card.tsx` — `Surface(raise)` + heading row; whole card becomes a `Link` when `href` is set
- `src/components/primitives/Badge.tsx` — pill with neutral/accent/warn/ok tones
- `src/styles/primitives.css` — token-driven classes for all five primitives

**Test setup added:**
- `vitest.config.ts` — jsdom env, oxc jsx automatic, excludes e2e/archives, mocks `next/link` via `setup.ts`
- `src/components/primitives/__tests__/setup.ts` — `next/link` mock
- 5 `*.test.tsx` files covering defaults, each variant, focus, and external Link attrs

**Verification:**
- All 6 files exist (`for f in Button Link Surface Card Badge; test -f ...`) ✓
- `npx vitest run src/components/primitives/__tests__/` → **5 files / 33 tests passed** ✓
- `npx tsc --noEmit` → clean ✓

**Note:** Installed `jsdom` as a dev dependency (was missing) so the test environment could run.
